concept.shortdesc: Do not allow engine oil, hydraulic fluid, coolant, or fuel to spill onto the ground.

conbody.p: Do not allow engine oil, hydraulic fluid, coolant, or fuel to spill onto the ground. Contain and properly dispose of all fluids.
Use approved containers for collecting used oils and fluids. Dispose of waste fluids in accordance with local environmental regulations.
The diesel particulate filter (DPF) removes particulate matter from exhaust gases. Do not modify or bypass the emissions control system.
DEF/Ad-Blue is an aqueous urea solution. Spills should be cleaned up immediately. DEF is not classified as hazardous but should be kept out of waterways.
Batteries contain sulfuric acid and lead. Dispose of old batteries at an approved recycling facility.
Tyres must be disposed of at an approved tyre recycling facility. Do not burn tyres.
Page 172 of 500 | CD100S-7 / CD120S-7 / CD140S-7 / CD160S-7 Operation & Maintenance Manual | DL06P Tier-4
Always follow all safety precautions when operating or maintaining this equipment.
Ensure all operators are properly trained and certified before operating the lift truck.
Regular maintenance is essential to safe and efficient operation of the lift truck.
Contact your local CROWN dealer for parts, service, and technical support.
Keep this manual with the lift truck at all times for reference by operators and technicians.
Record all service and maintenance activities in the maintenance logbook.
Only use genuine CROWN replacement parts to maintain warranty and performance.
